1.title: Senior Developer
1.Description:
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy enterprise application built on .NET Framework and a modern cloud-native ecosystem utilizing a 5-microservice .NET Core backend and React frontend, deployed on AWS EC2 with CI/CD via AWS CodePipeline and CodeCommit.
● Manage cloud infrastructure configurations on AWS, including orchestrating AWS API Gateways and configuring secure parameter management via AWS Parameter Store.
● Provide technical governance and quality assurance by reviewing the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers, guiding the team's alignment with SOLID standards.
● Author automated test coverage with Jest and Testing Library, plus Playwright end-to-end tests, validating releases across dev, UAT, and production environments.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Maintained and troubleshot a supply chain management system, diagnosing and resolving client-reported defects across front-end and back-end layers to ensure business continuity.
● Managed source code versioning and branching strategies using TFS, Azure DevOps, and Git.
● Maintained and optimized client databases in SQL Server and Oracle DB, authoring queries and stored procedures to ensure data integrity and performance.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed and maintained internal web applications using ASP.NET, C#, Angular, and Oracle SQL, supporting the firm's audit and advisory practice operations.
● Built and optimized database stored procedures and complex queries using Oracle PL/SQL and SQL Server to support reporting and data management requirements.
● Utilized Azure DevOps for source control, branch management, code reviews, and CI/CD pipeline execution.

1.title: Application Specialist
1.Description:
● Developed and launched the 'Accounting Integrated Management System' (AIMS), fully digitizing the procurement lifecycle for 100+ internal users.
● Reduced manual financial processing errors by 40% through automated validation logic and optimized PostgreSQL and SQL Server stored procedures.

1.title: Information Technology Specialist
1.Description:
● Led front-end and back-end development for a web application using Agile methodology, coordinating with a cross-functional development team to meet client milestones.
● Built a Traffic Violation Management System with an Android electronic ticketing module using C# MVC .NET Framework, Xamarin, SQL Server, and thermal printer integration.
